channel.title: Aboutme on Scott's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Aboutme on Scott's Blog

item.title: About Me
item.description: 04.2022 这个月的最后一个工作日，也是我在这家公司的最后一天。 12.2020 Faceing the reality, I have to start my new job again. 01.2020 Because of the COVID-19, the company is closed. Because everyone is not allowed to go out, I can’t find a new job. Then I decided to do a project with my friends. In this year, I learned Java and VUE, we did a project. Then use docker to deploy in the Linux server. Although I didn’t get a dood income, but I learned a lot in this year.
